title: FeatherExperience
description: Renewable corals, Deepslate farm, Warden Bossbar, and more!
body:
Feather Experience

Renewable corals, Deepslate farm, or something else.

[![GH Actions](https://github.com/MATRIX-feather/FeatherExperience/actions/workflows/build.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/MATRIX-feather/FeatherExperience/actions) [![Latest Release](https://img.shields.io/github/release/MATRIX-feather/FeatherExperience.svg)](https://github.com/MATRIX-feather/FeatherExperience/releases/latest) ## Features Every feature listed below is toggleable via the in-game command `/fexp option` - ***Some bone meal magic, like...*** - Duplicatable small flowers (dandelion, poppy, etc.) - Renewable corals - Make sugar cane grow taller like bedrock edition - **Lava generates Cobbled Deepslate or Deepslate below y0** - **Save tridents thrown to the void (!!! Requires Loyalty enchantment !!!)** - Open shulker boxes on your hand without placing them down! (Right-click facing the air) - Boss bar for Warden - Use eggs to interact with mobs can transform them into spawn eggs ## Dependencies * A Paper or Paper-based 1.20.4 Server, that's all you need.
